get.description: Get a list of subscription status definitions from the account.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the business unit for which to retrieve the subscription definitions.

parameters.name: includeTranslations
parameters.description: A boolean indicating whether to include translations of the subscription definitions. Defaults to false if not specified.

post.description: Generate communication preference links for a subscriber. This endpoint allows you to create URLs for managing preferences and unsubscribing, tailored to a specific subscriber. It is useful for integrating communication preference management into your applications.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The communication channel for which the links are generated. Must be 'EMAIL'.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The ID of the business unit associated with the request. Defaults to 0.

get.description: Retrieve the subscription statuses for a specific email address. This endpoint allows you to check the current subscription status for email communications, which can be useful for managing communication preferences and ensuring compliance with user preferences.

parameters.name: emailAddress
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient whose subscription status is being retrieved.

post.description: Retrieve the subscription statuses for multiple subscribers in a batch operation. This endpoint allows you to check the communication preferences of several subscribers at once, which is useful for managing large lists of contacts efficiently.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The communication channel to filter by. This parameter is required and currently only supports 'EMAIL'.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: An optional identifier for the business unit. This is an integer value.

post.summary: Batch unsubscribe contacts from all subscriptions
post.description: Unsubscribe a set of contacts from all email subscriptions.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: A required string specifying the communication channel. Currently, only 'EMAIL' is supported.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The ID of the business unit to which the operation applies. It is an optional parameter.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: A boolean indicating whether to include detailed information in the response. Defaults to false.

post.description: Retrieve the unsubscribe-all status for a batch of subscribers in a specified channel. This endpoint is useful for checking the current unsubscribe-all status of multiple subscribers at once, helping to manage and audit communication preferences efficiently.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The communication channel to check the unsubscribe-all status for. Currently, only 'EMAIL' is supported. This parameter is required.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The ID of the business unit for which the statuses are being retrieved. This is an optional parameter.

post.description: Update the subscription status for a set of contacts.

get.summary: Get subscription preferences for a specific contact
get.description: Retrieve a contact's current email subscription preferences.

parameters.name: subscriberIdString
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscriber whose communication preferences status is being retrieved.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: A required string indicating the communication channel to retrieve the status for. Valid value is 'EMAIL'.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: An optional integer representing the business unit ID to filter the subscription status.

post.description: Set the subscription status of a specific contact.

parameters.name: subscriberIdString
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscriber whose subscription status is to be updated.

get.description: Check whether a contact has unsubscribed from all email subscriptions. If a contact has not opted out of all communications, the response `results` array will be empty.

parameters.name: subscriberIdString
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscriber whose unsubscribe status is being retrieved.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The communication channel to unsubscribe from. Must be 'EMAIL'.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The ID of the business unit associated with the communication preferences.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: A boolean indicating whether to include detailed information in the response. Defaults to false.

post.description: Unsubscribe a subscriber from all communication channels. This endpoint allows you to remove a subscriber from all communication preferences, effectively opting them out from receiving any further communications. This can be useful for ensuring compliance with user requests or legal requirements.

parameters.name: subscriberIdString
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscriber to be unsubscribed from all communications.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The communication channel from which to unsubscribe the subscriber. Must be 'EMAIL'.

parameters.name: businessUnitId
parameters.description: The ID of the business unit associated with the subscriber. This is an optional parameter.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: A boolean flag indicating whether to include detailed information in the response. Defaults to false.

post.description: Subscribe a user to a specific communication preference using their email address and subscription ID. This endpoint allows you to manage subscription statuses by updating them to 'subscribed' for a given email address. It is useful for ensuring that users receive communications they have opted into.

Unsubscribe a user from communication preferences. This endpoint allows you to update the subscription status of a user to 'unsubscribed' for specified communication channels. It is useful for managing user preferences and ensuring compliance with user opt-out requests.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the operation was completed.

errors.description: An array of error objects detailing any issues encountered during the operation.

links.description: An object containing related links, where each key is a link name and each value is a URL.

numErrors.description: The number of errors encountered during the operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the request was made.

results.description: An array containing the results of the operation.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the operation started.

status.description: The current status of the operation, which can be PENDING, PROCESSING, CANCELED, or COMPLETE.

inputs.description: A list of strings representing the inputs for batch operations.

category.description: A string that categorizes the type of error.

context.description: An object containing additional context about the error condition, with keys as context names and values as arrays of strings.

errors.description: An array of ErrorDetail objects providing further information about the error.

id.description: A string representing the unique identifier of the error.

links.description: An object mapping link names to associated URIs that contain documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps.

message.description: A string containing a human-readable message describing the error.

status.description: A string indicating the status of the error.

subCategory.description: An object providing more specific categorization of the error.

managePreferencesUrl.description: The URL where the subscriber can manage their communication preferences.

subscriberIdString.description: A string representing the unique identifier of the subscriber.

unsubscribeAllUrl.description: A string containing the URL for unsubscribing the subscriber from all communications.

unsubscribeSingleUrl.description: A string containing the URL to unsubscribe the subscriber from a single communication.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the user whose subscription status is being updated. It is a required field and must be a string.

legalBasis.description: The legal basis for processing the subscription status change. It is an optional field and must be a string with valid values including 'LEGITIMATE_INTEREST_PQL', 'LEGITIMATE_INTEREST_CLIENT', 'PERFORMANCE_OF_CONTRACT', 'CONSENT_WITH_NOTICE', 'NON_GDPR', 'PROCESS_AND_STORE', and 'LEGITIMATE_INTEREST_OTHER'.

legalBasisExplanation.description: An optional field providing an explanation for the legal basis used. It must be a string.

subscriptionId.description: The unique identifier of the subscription for which the status is being updated. It is a required field and must be a string.

recipient.description: The email address of the recipient for whom the subscription statuses are being retrieved. It is a string.

subscriptionStatuses.description: An array of PublicSubscriptionStatus objects, each detailing the subscription status of the recipient for a particular subscription.

businessUnitId.description: The ID of the business unit associated with the subscription.

channel.description: The type of communication channel, with 'EMAIL' as the only supported option.
